246	
247	def _replicated_sinks_loader(
248	    shard_size: int,
249	    num_shards: int,
250	    attention_dp_size: int,
251	    tp_rank: int,
252	):
253	    """Load sinks replicated across attention DP ranks.
254	
255	    Each DP rank within the same TP position has a different shard of sinks.
256	    This loader concatenates all DP shards for the given TP position so the
257	    decode path doesn't need a runtime collective.
258	
259	    Returns a tensor of size [shard_size * attention_dp_size].
260	    """
261	    from vllm_neuron.utils.weight_loader import SafetensorsWeightLoader
262	
263	    ddp = attention_dp_size
264	
265	    def transform(slices, rank):
266	        assert len(slices) == 1
267	        slice_obj = slices[0]
268	        shards = []
269	        for dp_rank in range(ddp):
270	            effective_rank = dp_rank + tp_rank * ddp
271	            start = (effective_rank % num_shards) * shard_size
272	            end = start + shard_size
273	            shards.append(slice_obj[start:end])
274	        return torch.cat(shards, dim=0).to(torch.float32)
275	
276	    return SafetensorsWeightLoader(transform=transform)
277	
278	
279	class GptOssAttention(nn.Module):
280	    """Multi-head attention with TP head sharding.
281	
282	    >>> PARALLELISM: TP <<<
283	    - Q/K/V heads are sharded across TP ranks
284	    - KV heads are replicated when fewer than TP size (GQA)
285	    - Prefill: all-gather input → QKV proj → attention → O proj → reduce-scatter
286	    - Decode: fused megakernel with TP all-reduce
287	
288	    <-- MODEL-SPECIFIC:
289	    - GQA with separate Q and KV head counts
290	    - Learnable attention sinks (per-head logit bias)
291	    - Sliding window on even-indexed layers
292	    - YaRN RoPE (externally computed)
293	    """
294	
295	    def __init__(self, config: GptOssConfig, layer_idx: int):
296	        super().__init__()
297	        self.layer_idx = layer_idx
298	        self.head_dim = config.head_dim
299	        self.dtype = config.torch_dtype
300	        self.rms_norm_eps = config.rms_norm_eps
301	        self.hidden_size = config.hidden_size
302	        self.unpadded_hidden_size = config.unpadded_hidden_size
303	        self.num_attention_heads = config.num_attention_heads
304	        self.num_key_value_heads = config.num_key_value_heads
305	        self.scaling = config.head_dim**-0.5
306	        self.max_seq_len = config.max_position_embeddings
307	
308	        # <-- MODEL-SPECIFIC: Sliding window on alternating (even) layers
309	        self.sliding_window = config.sliding_window if layer_idx % 2 == 0 else None
310	
311	        # >>> PARALLELISM: TP group setup <<<
312	        self.tp_group = get_tp_group()
313	        self.world_size = self.tp_group.world_size
314	        self.rank = self.tp_group.rank_in_group
315	
316	        # >>> PARALLELISM: Attention DP setup <<<
317	        self.attention_dp_size = (
318	            config.neuron_config.attention_dp_size if config.neuron_config else 1
319	        )
320	        from vllm_neuron.parallel.neuron_parallel_state import (
321	            get_neuron_attention_dp_group,
322	            get_neuron_attention_dp_rank,
323	        )
324	
325	        self.attention_dp_group = get_neuron_attention_dp_group()
326	        self.attention_dp_rank = get_neuron_attention_dp_rank()
327	
328	        # >>> PARALLELISM: Attention TP group (TP * attn_dp) <<<
329	        from vllm_neuron.parallel.neuron_parallel_state import (
330	            get_neuron_attention_tp_group,
331	        )
332	
333	        self.attn_tp_group = get_neuron_attention_tp_group()
334	
335	        # Effective sharding degree for Q/O (TP for standard, TP*DDP for attention DP)
336	        effective_q_shards = self.world_size * self.attention_dp_size
337	
338	        # >>> PARALLELISM: Head sharding calculation <<<
339	        # Q heads divided evenly across TP * attention DP ranks
340	        self.num_attention_heads_per_rank = (
341	            self.num_attention_heads // effective_q_shards
342	        )
343	
344	        # KV heads: cache sizing (always full TP amount)
345	        self.kv_needs_a2a = (
346	            self.attention_dp_size > 1
347	            and self.num_key_value_heads > self.world_size
348	            and self.num_key_value_heads % effective_q_shards == 0
349	        )
350	
351	        if self.world_size >= self.num_key_value_heads:
352	            self.num_key_value_heads_per_rank = 1
353	            self.num_kv_replicas = self.world_size // self.num_key_value_heads
354	        else:
355	            self.num_key_value_heads_per_rank = (
356	                self.num_key_value_heads // self.world_size
357	            )
358	            self.num_kv_replicas = 1
359	
360	        # KV heads-per-rank used in the QKV projection output. When
361	        # kv_needs_a2a, attention DP shards KV further than world_size, so
362	        # the projection emits a smaller K/V block than `num_key_value_heads_per_rank`.
363	        # Stored on self so the prefill path can pass the correct value to
364	        # NF.qkv_proj's fused-RoPE (which uses num_kv_heads to delimit the
365	        # K block within the projection output).
366	        self.num_kv_heads_for_weight = (
367	            self.num_key_value_heads // effective_q_shards
368	            if self.kv_needs_a2a
369	            else self.num_key_value_heads_per_rank
370	        )
371	        num_kv_heads_for_weight = self.num_kv_heads_for_weight  # local alias
372	
373	        self.num_key_value_groups = (
374	            self.num_attention_heads_per_rank // num_kv_heads_for_weight
375	        )
376	
377	        # Q/KV heads after all-to-all
378	        self.num_q_heads_after_a2a = (
379	            self.num_attention_heads_per_rank * self.attention_dp_size
380	        )
381	        self.num_kv_heads_after_a2a = (
382	            num_kv_heads_for_weight * self.attention_dp_size
383	            if self.kv_needs_a2a
384	            else self.num_key_value_heads_per_rank
385	        )
386	
387	        # >>> PARALLELISM: QKV weight shapes for TP * attention DP <<<
388	        q_size = self.num_attention_heads_per_rank * self.head_dim
389	        kv_size = num_kv_heads_for_weight * self.head_dim
390	        qkv_size = q_size + 2 * kv_size
391	        o_proj_in_features = (
392	            self.num_attention_heads * self.head_dim
393	        ) // effective_q_shards
394	
395	        self.qkv_proj_weight = nn.Parameter(
396	            torch.empty(self.hidden_size, qkv_size, dtype=self.dtype)
397	        )
398	        # Conditionally create bias parameters based on config
399	        if config.attention_bias:
400	            self.qkv_proj_bias = nn.Parameter(torch.zeros(qkv_size, dtype=self.dtype))
401	            self.o_proj_bias = nn.Parameter(torch.zeros(self.hidden_size, dtype=self.dtype))
402	        else:
403	            # Register as None so state_dict doesn't expect them
404	            self.register_parameter('qkv_proj_bias', None)
405	            self.register_parameter('o_proj_bias', None)
406	        self.o_proj_weight = nn.Parameter(
407	            torch.empty(o_proj_in_features, self.hidden_size, dtype=self.dtype)
408	        )
409	
410	        # <-- MODEL-SPECIFIC: Learnable attention sinks (per-head)
411	        # Pre-gathered across attention DP so no runtime all_gather is needed.
412	        self.sinks = nn.Parameter(
413	            torch.zeros(self.num_q_heads_after_a2a, dtype=torch.float32)
414	        )
415	
416	        self.q_size = q_size
417	        self.kv_size = kv_size
418	        self.qkv_split_indices = [q_size, q_size + kv_size]
419	
420	        # KV caches bound externally via bind_kv_cache()
421	        self.k_cache = None
422	        self.v_cache = None
423	
424	        # When the K cache uses the swizzled packed FP8 layout
425	        # ([num_blocks, (kv_heads,) block_len // 2, d_head, 2]) the attention
426	        # kernel reads it via bf16-reinterpret + DMA-transpose, and writes are
427	        # done in the packed layout. Detected from cache rank (K has one extra
428	        # trailing dim vs V, which is never packed).
429	        self.fp8_packed = False
430	
431	        # KV cache quantization scales are set during weight loading.
432	        # We also need floats since tensor.item() causes a graph break,
433	        # and kernels currently use floats for perf reasons.
434	        self.register_buffer("k_scale", None, persistent=False)
435	        self.register_buffer("v_scale", None, persistent=False)
436	        self.k_scale_float = 1.0
437	        self.v_scale_float = 1.0
438	
439	        # Set up weight loaders for checkpoint loading
440	        self._setup_weight_loaders()
441	
442	    def _setup_weight_loaders(self):
443	        """Attach weight loaders for checkpoint → parameter transformation.
444	
445	        >>> PARALLELISM: Weight loaders handle TP (and attention DP) sharding.
446	        <-- MODEL-SPECIFIC: The fused QKV layout, hidden dim padding, and
447	        checkpoint tensor naming are model-specific.
448	
449	        With attention DP: Q/O are sharded across TP*attention DP using an interleaved
450	        effective rank. KV may also be sharded when kv_needs_a2a.
451	        """
452	        ddp = self.attention_dp_size
453	        effective_q_shards = self.world_size * ddp
454	        effective_q_rank = self.attention_dp_rank + self.tp_group.rank_in_group * ddp
455	
456	        qkv_loader = fused_qkv_weight_loader(
457	            q_size=self.q_size,
458	            kv_size=self.kv_size,
459	            shard_dim=1,
460	            num_shards=effective_q_shards,
461	            num_kv_heads=self.num_key_value_heads,
462	            head_dim=self.head_dim,
463	            hidden_size=self.hidden_size,
464	            num_kv_replicas=self.num_kv_replicas,
465	            kv_num_shards=self.world_size if not self.kv_needs_a2a else None,
466	        )
467	        qkv_loader = with_rank_override(qkv_loader, rank=effective_q_rank)
468	        set_weight_loader(self.qkv_proj_weight, qkv_loader)
469	
470	        # Only register bias loader if bias parameters exist
471	        if self.qkv_proj_bias is not None:
472	            qkv_bias_loader = fused_qkv_bias_loader(
473	                q_size=self.q_size,
474	                kv_size=self.kv_size,
475	                num_shards=effective_q_shards,
476	                num_kv_heads=self.num_key_value_heads,
477	                head_dim=self.head_dim,
478	                num_kv_replicas=self.num_kv_replicas,
479	                kv_num_shards=self.world_size if not self.kv_needs_a2a else None,
480	            )
481	            qkv_bias_loader = with_rank_override(qkv_bias_loader, rank=effective_q_rank)
482	            set_weight_loader(self.qkv_proj_bias, qkv_bias_loader)
483	
484	        o_loader = o_proj_weight_loader(
485	            shard_size=(self.num_attention_heads * self.head_dim) // effective_q_shards,
486	            num_shards=effective_q_shards,
487	            hidden_size=self.hidden_size,
488	        )
489	        o_loader = with_rank_override(o_loader, rank=effective_q_rank)
490	        set_weight_loader(self.o_proj_weight, o_loader)
491	
492	        o_bias_loader = scaled_bias_loader(
493	            scale=effective_q_shards, padded_size=self.hidden_size
494	        )
495	        o_bias_loader = with_rank_override(o_bias_loader, rank=effective_q_rank)
496	        set_weight_loader(self.o_proj_bias, o_bias_loader)
497	
498	        sinks_loader = _replicated_sinks_loader(
499	            shard_size=self.num_attention_heads_per_rank,
500	            num_shards=effective_q_shards,
501	            attention_dp_size=self.attention_dp_size,
502	            tp_rank=self.tp_group.rank_in_group,
503	        )
504	        set_weight_loader(self.sinks, sinks_loader)
505	
506	    # ── Forward dispatch ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
507	
508	    def forward(
509	        self,
510	        hidden_states: torch.Tensor,
511	        positions: torch.LongTensor | None,
512	        position_embeddings: tuple[torch.Tensor, torch.Tensor],
513	        attn_metadata: object | None = None,
514	        attn_mask=None,
515	    ):
516	        """Dispatch to prefill or decode path based on metadata.
517	
518	        >>> PARALLELISM: Dispatch logic <<<
519	        - Prefill: all-gather for SP before attention, reduce-scatter after
520	        - Decode: fused megakernel handles TP internally
521	        """
522	        layer_name = f"layers.{self.layer_idx}.self_attn"
523	        max_query_len = attn_metadata[layer_name]["max_query_len"]
524	        decode_token_threshold = attn_metadata[layer_name]["decode_token_threshold"]
525	
526	        if max_query_len <= decode_token_threshold:
527	            return self.forward_decode(
528	                hidden_states,
529	                positions,
530	                position_embeddings,
531	                attn_mask,
532	                attn_metadata,
533	            )
534	        else:
535	            # >>> PARALLELISM: All-gather from SP before attention <<<
536	            if self.world_size > 1:
537	                hidden_states = self.tp_group.all_gather(hidden_states, dim=0)
538	
539	            return self.forward_prefill(
540	                hidden_states,
541	                positions,
542	                position_embeddings,
543	                attn_metadata,
544	            )
545	
546	    def _write_paged_kv_cache(self, k, v, slot_mapping, block_size):
547	        """Scatter post-RoPE K/V into the paged cache at slot_mapping positions.
548	
549	        Used on the prefill paths where the cache write is NOT folded into the
550	        qkv kernel (full prefill needs raw K/V for flash attention; packed-FP8
551	        segmented prefill cannot use the in-kernel write). FP8 caches store
552	        ``fp8(clamp(tensor * scale))``; bf16 caches store directly. V is never
553	        packed; packed K is un-swizzled, scattered, then re-swizzled in place.
554	        """
555	        if self.k_cache.dtype in [torch.float8_e4m3fn, torch.float8_e5m2]:
556	            k_flat = (
557	                (k.reshape(-1, self.head_dim) * self.k_scale)
558	                .clamp(-FP8_CLAMP_MAX, FP8_CLAMP_MAX)
559	                .to(self.k_cache.dtype)
560	            )
561	            v_flat = (
562	                (v.reshape(-1, self.head_dim) * self.v_scale)
563	                .clamp(-FP8_CLAMP_MAX, FP8_CLAMP_MAX)
564	                .to(self.k_cache.dtype)
565	            )
566	        else:
567	            k_flat = k.reshape(-1, self.head_dim).to(self.k_cache.dtype)
568	            v_flat = v.reshape(-1, self.head_dim).to(self.k_cache.dtype)
569	
570	        nkh = self.num_key_value_heads_per_rank
571	        block_indices = (slot_mapping // block_size).repeat(nkh)
572	        position_indices = (slot_mapping % block_size).repeat(nkh)
573	        head_indices = torch.arange(
574	            nkh, dtype=torch.long, device=k.device
575	        ).repeat_interleave(slot_mapping.shape[0])
576	        index = (block_indices, head_indices, position_indices)
577	
578	        # V is never packed → scatters directly.
579	        self.v_cache.index_put_(index, v_flat)
580	        if self.fp8_packed:
581	            # Packed K cache [blocks, Nkh, block_size // 2, Dh, 2]: the swizzle
582	            # interleaves adjacent token positions into the trailing size-2 dim,
583	            # so a per-token scatter isn't expressible directly. Un-swizzle to
584	            # the standard layout, scatter, then re-swizzle back in place
585	            # (matching the decode kernel's write).
586	            k_unpacked = _unswizzle_packed_k(self.k_cache)
587	            k_unpacked.index_put_(index, k_flat)
588	            self.k_cache.copy_(_swizzle_packed_k(k_unpacked))
589	        else:
590	            self.k_cache.index_put_(index, k_flat)
591	
592	    # ── Prefill path ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
593	
594	    def forward_prefill(
595	        self,
596	        hidden_states: torch.Tensor,
597	        positions: torch.LongTensor,
598	        position_embeddings: tuple[torch.Tensor, torch.Tensor],
599	        attn_metadata: object | None = None,
600	    ) -> torch.Tensor:
601	        """Prefill: full-sequence attention with flash attention.
602	
603	        Pipeline:
604	        1. QKV projection          >>> PARALLELISM: TP sharded heads <<<
605	        2. RoPE                    <-- MODEL-SPECIFIC: YaRN RoPE
606	        3. KV cache update         >>> PARALLELISM: per-rank cache <<<
607	        4. Flash attention          <-- MODEL-SPECIFIC: sinks + sliding window
608	        5. Output projection       >>> PARALLELISM: reduce-scatter after O proj <<<
609	        """
610	        if attn_metadata is None:
611	            return torch.zeros_like(hidden_states)
612	
613	        hidden_states = hidden_states.to(self.dtype)
614	        tokens, hidden = hidden_states.shape
615	
616	        # ── Step 1: QKV Projection (with fused RoPE) ─────────────────────
617	        # <-- MODEL-SPECIFIC: YaRN/NTK RoPE — fused into the qkv_proj kernel.
618	        # GptOssRotaryEmbedding emits cos/sin of shape [T, d_head/2]; the
619	        # kernel expects [B, T, d_head] for split-in-half RoPE. cat-double
620	        # makes the second half match the first so the kernel's per-half
621	        # math is equivalent to gpt-oss's non-interleaved RoPE.
622	        cos, sin = position_embeddings
623	        cos_cache = torch.cat([cos, cos], dim=-1).unsqueeze(0)
624	        sin_cache = torch.cat([sin, sin], dim=-1).unsqueeze(0)
625	
626	        # ── KV cache metadata (pulled up so segmented branch can fold the
627	        # post-RoPE K/V cache write into the qkv kernel). ──
628	        # >>> PARALLELISM: Cache is per-rank (TP sharded KV heads) <<<
629	        layer_name = f"layers.{self.layer_idx}.self_attn"
630	        slot_mapping = attn_metadata[layer_name]["slot_mapping"]
631	        block_size = attn_metadata[layer_name]["block_size"]
632	        block_table = attn_metadata[layer_name]["block_table_tensor"]
633	        cached_seq_len = attn_metadata[layer_name].get("cached_seq_len")
634	        kv_segment_size = attn_metadata[layer_name].get("kv_segment_size")
635	
636	        kv_is_fp8 = self.k_cache.dtype in [torch.float8_e4m3fn, torch.float8_e5m2]
637	
638	        # ── Step 3+4: KV cache write + Attention ──────────────────────────
639	        # <-- MODEL-SPECIFIC: sinks, sliding window
640	        if kv_segment_size:
641	            # attention_segmented_cte cannot read a non-packed FP8 K cache;
642	            # fail fast on the unsupported combo (see helper for rationale).
643	            validate_fp8_segmented_supported(kv_is_fp8, self.fp8_packed)
644	
645	            # bf16 (non-packed): fold the post-RoPE K/V cache write into the qkv
646	            # kernel (in-kernel write: must_alias output → FX aliasing pass
647	            # threads back to self.k_cache / self.v_cache for the downstream
648	            # segmented_attention). The qkv kernel cannot emit the swizzled
649	            # packed-FP8 K layout, so packed FP8 falls back to a plain projection
650	            # + explicit (un)swizzled scatter.
651	            if not self.fp8_packed:
652	                # Sanitize slot_mapping for the in-kernel scatter: the qkv NKI
653	                # kernel uses slot_mapping values as direct DMA offsets into the
654	                # cache, with no oob_mode.skip on this path — out-of-range slots
655	                # cause a hardware OOB. Remap sentinels (< 0) and stale values
656	                # (>= num_blocks * block_size) to slot 0; the K/V they would
657	                # have written are unused (padding tokens never read), so the
658	                # harmless write is acceptable. Mirrors PR #2306's decode path.
659	                num_blocks_total = self.k_cache.shape[0]
660	                max_slot = num_blocks_total * block_size
661	                slot_mapping_clamped = torch.where(
662	                    (slot_mapping < 0) | (slot_mapping >= max_slot),
663	                    torch.zeros_like(slot_mapping),
664	                    slot_mapping,
665	                ).to(torch.int32)
666	
667	                # In-kernel write is bf16-only (guarded above): FP8 segmented
668	                # must be packed, which takes the explicit-scatter branch below.
669	                q_hbm, _, _ = NF.qkv_proj(
670	                    hidden=hidden_states.unsqueeze(0),
671	                    qkv_weights=self.qkv_proj_weight,
672	                    bias=self.qkv_proj_bias.unsqueeze(0) if self.qkv_proj_bias is not None else None,
673	                    d_head=self.head_dim,
674	                    cos_cache=cos_cache,
675	                    sin_cache=sin_cache,
676	                    num_q_heads=self.num_attention_heads_per_rank,
677	                    num_kv_heads=self.num_kv_heads_for_weight,
678	                    k_cache=self.k_cache,
679	                    v_cache=self.v_cache,
680	                    use_block_kv=True,
681	                    block_size=block_size,
682	                    slot_mapping=slot_mapping_clamped,
683	                )
684	                q = (
685	                    q_hbm.squeeze(0)
686	                    .view(tokens, self.num_attention_heads_per_rank, self.head_dim)
687	                    .transpose(0, 1)
688	                )
689	            else:
690	                # Packed FP8 K cache: the qkv kernel cannot write the swizzled
691	                # layout, so project + RoPE without the in-kernel write, then
692	                # scatter K/V explicitly (un-swizzle K, scatter, re-swizzle).
693	                qkv = NF.qkv_proj(
694	                    hidden=hidden_states.unsqueeze(0),
695	                    qkv_weights=self.qkv_proj_weight,
696	                    bias=self.qkv_proj_bias.unsqueeze(0) if self.qkv_proj_bias is not None else None,
697	                    d_head=self.head_dim,
698	                    cos_cache=cos_cache,
699	                    sin_cache=sin_cache,
700	                    num_q_heads=self.num_attention_heads_per_rank,
701	                    num_kv_heads=self.num_kv_heads_for_weight,
702	                ).squeeze(0)
703	                q, k, v = torch.tensor_split(qkv, self.qkv_split_indices, dim=-1)
704	                q = q.view(
705	                    tokens, self.num_attention_heads_per_rank, self.head_dim
706	                ).transpose(0, 1)
707	                k = k.view(
708	                    tokens, self.num_key_value_heads_per_rank, self.head_dim
709	                ).transpose(0, 1)
710	                v = v.view(
711	                    tokens, self.num_key_value_heads_per_rank, self.head_dim
712	                ).transpose(0, 1)
713	                self._write_paged_kv_cache(k, v, slot_mapping, block_size)
714	
715	            attn_output = NF.segmented_attention(
716	                q,
717	                k_cache=self.k_cache,
718	                v_cache=self.v_cache,
719	                block_tables=block_table,
720	                prior_tokens=cached_seq_len,
721	                block_size=block_size,
722	                kv_segment_size=kv_segment_size,
723	                scale=self.scaling,
724	                sliding_window=self.sliding_window,
725	                sink=self.sinks.unsqueeze(1),
726	                tp_q=True,
727	                tp_out=True,
728	                fp8_packed=self.fp8_packed,
729	            )  # [Nh, Dh, T]
730	        else:
731	            # Full prefill: kernel returns concatenated QKV; cache is written
732	            # via index_put_ since flash_attention needs raw K/V tensors.
733	            qkv = NF.qkv_proj(
734	                hidden=hidden_states.unsqueeze(0),
735	                qkv_weights=self.qkv_proj_weight,
736	                bias=self.qkv_proj_bias.unsqueeze(0) if self.qkv_proj_bias is not None else None,
737	                d_head=self.head_dim,
738	                cos_cache=cos_cache,
739	                sin_cache=sin_cache,
740	                num_q_heads=self.num_attention_heads_per_rank,
741	                num_kv_heads=self.num_kv_heads_for_weight,
742	            ).squeeze(0)
743	
744	            q, k, v = torch.tensor_split(qkv, self.qkv_split_indices, dim=-1)
745	            q = q.view(
746	                tokens, self.num_attention_heads_per_rank, self.head_dim
747	            ).transpose(0, 1)
748	            k = k.view(
749	                tokens, self.num_key_value_heads_per_rank, self.head_dim
750	            ).transpose(0, 1)
751	            v = v.view(
752	                tokens, self.num_key_value_heads_per_rank, self.head_dim
753	            ).transpose(0, 1)
754	
755	            # KV cache update via index_put_ (flash_attention needs raw K/V).
756	            self._write_paged_kv_cache(k, v, slot_mapping, block_size)
757	
758	            # Full prefill: standard flash attention
759	            k = k.repeat_interleave(self.num_key_value_groups, dim=0)
760	            v = v.repeat_interleave(self.num_key_value_groups, dim=0)
761	
762	            q_flash = q.transpose(1, 2)  # [Nh, Dh, T]
763	            k_flash = k.transpose(1, 2)  # [Nh, Dh, T]
764	            v_flash = v  # [Nh, T, Dh]
765	
766	            attn_output = NF.flash_attention(
767	                q_flash,
768	                k_flash,
769	                v_flash,
770	                scale=self.scaling,
771	                sliding_window=self.sliding_window,
772	                sink=self.sinks.unsqueeze(1),
773	                tp_q=False,
774	                tp_out=True,
775	            )  # [Nh, Dh, T]
776	
777	        # ── Step 5: Output Projection ────────────────────────────────────
778	        attn_output = attn_output.unsqueeze(0)  # [1, Nh, Dh, T]
779	        attn_output = NF.o_proj(
780	            attn_output, self.o_proj_weight, self.o_proj_bias.unsqueeze(0)
781	        )  # [1, T, H]
782	        attn_output = attn_output.squeeze(0)  # [T, H]
783	
784	        # >>> PARALLELISM: Reduce-scatter to return to SP layout <<<
785	        if self.world_size > 1:
786	            attn_output = self.tp_group.reduce_scatter(attn_output, dim=0)
787	
788	        return attn_output.contiguous()
789	
790	    # ── Decode path ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
791	
792	    def forward_decode(
793	        self,
794	        hidden_states: torch.Tensor,
795	        positions: torch.LongTensor,
796	        position_embeddings: tuple[torch.Tensor, torch.Tensor],
797	        attn_mask,
798	        attn_metadata: object,
799	    ):
800	        """Decode: fused megakernel for single-token generation.
801	
802	        >>> PARALLELISM: The megakernel handles TP internally. <<<
803	        The kernel performs QKV proj, RoPE, attention, and O proj in one fused call.
804	        TP all-reduce is done after the kernel.
805	
806	        <-- MODEL-SPECIFIC: GPT-OSS specific kernel arguments:
807	        - sink tokens for attention stability
808	        - sliding window mask generation
809	        - Non-interleaved RoPE layout
810	        """
811	        layer_name = f"layers.{self.layer_idx}.self_attn"
812	        slot_mapping = attn_metadata[layer_name]["slot_mapping"]
813	        block_size = attn_metadata[layer_name]["block_size"]
814	        max_blocks_per_seq = attn_metadata[layer_name]["max_blocks_per_seq"]
815	        block_table = attn_metadata[layer_name]["block_table_tensor"]
816	
817	        # B_local is from metadata (per-DP-rank batch size).
818	        # Caller ensures input is gathered to B_local * attn_dp via _dp_transition.
819	        B_local = block_table.shape[0]
820	        B = B_local * self.attention_dp_size
821	        tokens, hidden = hidden_states.shape
822	        S_decode = tokens // B
823	        assert tokens == B * S_decode
824	
825	        hidden_states = hidden_states.to(self.dtype)
826	        S_ctx = max_blocks_per_seq * block_size
827	        nkh = self.num_key_value_heads_per_rank
828	
829	        # Reshape: [B*S, H] → [B, S, H]
830	        X = hidden_states.view(B, S_decode, hidden)
831	
832	        # Prepare RoPE for megakernel format: [T, Dh/2] → [Dh/2, B_local, S]
833	        cos, sin = position_embeddings
834	        half_d = self.head_dim // 2
835	        cos_kernel = (
836	            cos[:, :half_d]
837	            .view(B_local, S_decode, half_d)
838	            .permute(2, 0, 1)
839	            .contiguous()
840	            .to(self.dtype)
841	        )
842	        sin_kernel = (
843	            sin[:, :half_d]
844	            .view(B_local, S_decode, half_d)
845	            .permute(2, 0, 1)
846	            .contiguous()
847	            .to(self.dtype)
848	        )
849	
850	        pos_ids = positions.view(1, B_local * S_decode)
851	        start_pos = None
852	
853	        pos_ids_kernel = None
854	        swa_start_pos_ids_kernel = None
855	
856	        if attn_mask is None:
857	            if self.sliding_window is not None:
858	                # The model runner has already trimmed block_table to the
859	                # window-relevant blocks for SWA layers and provided per-seq
860	                # swa_kv_pos_offset = start_block * block_size. Shift pos_ids into
861	                # the trimmed window frame before computing the causal mask.
862	                swa_kv_pos_offset = attn_metadata[layer_name].get("swa_kv_pos_offset")
863	                if swa_kv_pos_offset is not None:
864	                    pos_ids = pos_ids - swa_kv_pos_offset.view(B, 1).expand(
865	                        B, S_decode
866	                    ).reshape(1, B * S_decode)
867	                    # Clamp the trimmed-frame position to >= 0 (see
868	                    # _precompute_decode_attn_masks for the full rationale).
869	                    # No-op for a real row; for a no-token padding/freed row
870	                    # (positions zero-padded to 0, while swa_kv_pos_offset is
871	                    # positive) it prevents pos_ids = 0 - offset < 0 from
872	                    # driving the kernel's on-chip mask wrap branch to mark the
873	                    # whole window valid over an all-(-1) block_table ->
874	                    # stale-K NaN -> 1006.
875	                    pos_ids = torch.clamp(pos_ids, min=0)
876	                start_pos = torch.clamp(pos_ids - self.sliding_window + 1, min=0)
877	
878	            pos_ids_kernel = pos_ids.view(B_local, S_decode).to(torch.float32)
879	            swa_start_pos_ids_kernel = (
880	                start_pos.view(B_local, S_decode).to(torch.float32)
881	                if start_pos is not None
882	                else None
883	            )
884	
885	        active_blocks_table = block_table
886	
887	        # Packed FP8 is decided per decode bucket. The cache is *stored* packed
888	        # (self.fp8_packed), but the packed decode kernel requires the resized
889	        # block_len to stay >= 2, which some bucket geometries (small SWA
890	        # windows, batch=1) violate. For a non-viable bucket, un-swizzle the
891	        # packed cache to the standard [blocks, block_len, d_head] layout, run
892	        # the unpacked kernel (which updates that standard-layout buffer in
893	        # place), then re-swizzle the result back into the packed self.k_cache.
894	        # The viability flag is a static (trace-time) bool, so each compiled
895	        # decode NEFF takes exactly one branch.
896	        use_packed_kernel = self.fp8_packed and _packed_fp8_viable_for_bucket(
897	            block_len=block_size,
898	            bs=B_local,
899	            q_head=self.num_q_heads_after_a2a,
900	            s_active=S_decode,
901	            s_prior=S_ctx,
902	        )
903	        k_cache_arg = (
904	            self.k_cache
905	            if (use_packed_kernel or not self.fp8_packed)
906	            else _unswizzle_packed_k(self.k_cache)
907	        )
908	
909	        # >>> PARALLELISM: Fused megakernel with TP-sharded weights <<<
910	        # In-kernel KV cache update (update_cache=True): the kernel writes K/V
911	        # in place and the FX aliasing pass threads the write back to the
912	        # K_cache/V_cache tensors passed in. When the cache is read packed, that
913	        # target is self.k_cache directly; on the un-swizzled fallback the write
914	        # lands in the temporary standard-layout buffer and is re-packed below.
915	        # With update_cache=True the API returns only the attention output.
916	        output = NF.attention_decode(
917	            X=X,
918	            X_hidden_dim_actual=self.unpadded_hidden_size,
919	            rmsnorm_X_enabled=False,  # RMSNorm applied by decoder layer
920	            W_qkv=self.qkv_proj_weight,
921	            bias_qkv=self.qkv_proj_bias.unsqueeze(0),
922	            rmsnorm_QK_pre_rope_enabled=False,
923	            rmsnorm_QK_post_rope_enabled=False,
924	            cos=cos_kernel,
925	            sin=sin_kernel,
926	            rope_contiguous_layout=True,
927	            K_cache_transposed=False,
928	            active_blocks_table=active_blocks_table,
929	            K_cache=k_cache_arg,
930	            V_cache=self.v_cache,
931	            attention_mask=attn_mask,
932	            pos_ids=pos_ids_kernel,
933	            swa_start_pos_ids=swa_start_pos_ids_kernel,
934	            # Kernel currently requires fusing the K scale dequantization into softmax scale for KV quantization
935	            softmax_scale=self.scaling / self.k_scale_float,
936	            # <-- MODEL-SPECIFIC: Sink tokens
937	            sink=self.sinks.unsqueeze(1),
938	            update_cache=True,
939	            kv_cache_update_idx=slot_mapping.view(B_local, S_decode).to(torch.uint32),
940	            fp8_packed=use_packed_kernel,
941	            # Kernel currently requires fusing the V scale dequantization into W_out for KV quantization
942	            W_out=self.o_proj_weight / self.v_scale_float,
943	            bias_out=self.o_proj_bias.unsqueeze(0),
944	            transposed_out=False,
945	            out_in_sb=False,
946	            k_scale=self.k_scale
947	            if self.k_cache.dtype in [torch.float8_e4m3fn, torch.float8_e5m2]
948	            else None,
949	            v_scale=self.v_scale
950	            if self.v_cache.dtype in [torch.float8_e4m3fn, torch.float8_e5m2]
951	            else None,
952	            attention_dp=self.attention_dp_size,
953	            attention_dp_group=self.attention_dp_group.device_group
954	            if self.attention_dp_group
955	            else None,
956	            attention_dp_rank=self.attention_dp_rank,
957	            kv_needs_a2a=self.kv_needs_a2a,
958	        )
959	
960	        # Non-viable packed bucket: the unpacked kernel updated the temporary
961	        # standard-layout K buffer; re-swizzle it back into the packed cache.
962	        if self.fp8_packed and not use_packed_kernel:
963	            self.k_cache.copy_(_swizzle_packed_k(k_cache_arg))
964	
965	        # >>> PARALLELISM: Sum O-proj partials across TP * attn_dp <<<
966	        self.attn_tp_group.all_reduce(output)
967	
968	        return output
969	
970	
971	# =============================================================================
972	# Section 4: MoE Experts
973	# Mixed: PARALLELISM (TP sharding of expert weights, SP collectives) +
974	#        MODEL-SPECIFIC (SwiGLU activation, clamping, routing params)
975	# =============================================================================
976	class GptOssExperts(nn.Module):
977	    """Expert feed-forward layers with TP, optional EP, and cross-DP EP support.
978	
979	    >>> PARALLELISM: TP + EP <<<
980	    - EP disabled (ep_degree=1): all experts on all ranks, intermediate sharded by TP
981	    - EP within TP (ep_degree=TP): experts partitioned across TP ranks (linear placement),
982	      full intermediate per rank (tp_degree=1)
983	    - EP across DP (ep_degree=TP*DP): experts spread across all ranks. Cross-DP token
984	      reduce-scatter (prefill) or all-reduce (decode) across moe_group.
985	
986	    <-- MODEL-SPECIFIC:
987	    - 32 experts, top-4 per token
988	    - SwiGLU activation with per-gate and per-up clamping
989	    - Softmax routing with post-scale expert affinities
990	    - Pre-MLP RMSNorm
991	    """
992	
993	    def __init__(self, config: GptOssConfig):
994	        super().__init__()
995	
996	        # >>> PARALLELISM: TP + EP configuration <<<
997	        # - Without EP: experts are replicated, intermediate dim is TP-sharded.
998	        # - With EP (variable degree): experts are partitioned across ep_degree
999	        #   ranks, intermediate dim is sharded across tp_degree = world_size / ep_degree.
1000	        #   Pure EP (ep_degree = world_size) gives tp_degree = 1 (no intermediate sharding).
1001	        # moe_group = tp_group for outer collectives (all-reduce, reduce-scatter).
1002	        # ep_tp_group = TP sub-group within EP partition for blockwise mapping.
1003	        self.tp_group = get_tp_group()
1004	        self.rank = self.tp_group.rank_in_group
1005	
1006	        from vllm.config import get_current_vllm_config
1007	
1008	        vllm_config = get_current_vllm_config()
1009	        self.ep_enabled = vllm_config.parallel_config.enable_expert_parallel
1010	        self.dp_size = vllm_config.parallel_config.data_parallel_size
1011	
1012	        # >>> PARALLELISM: MLP DP setup <<<
1013	        self.mlp_dp_size = (
1014	            config.neuron_config.mlp_dp_size if config.neuron_config else 1
1015	        )
1016	        from vllm_neuron.parallel.neuron_parallel_state import (
1017	            get_neuron_mlp_tp_group,
1018	        )
1019	
1020	        self.mlp_tp_group = get_neuron_mlp_tp_group()
1021	        self.mlp_tp_rank = self.mlp_tp_group.rank_in_group
1022	
1023	        if self.ep_enabled:
1024	            # EP enabled: read degree from neuron parallel state (always
1025	            # initialized as GroupCoordinator when EP is active).
1026	            from vllm_neuron.parallel.neuron_parallel_state import (
1027	                get_neuron_ep_degree,
1028	                get_neuron_ep_rank,
1029	                get_neuron_ep_tp_group,
1030	            )
1031	
1032	            self.ep_degree = get_neuron_ep_degree()
1033	            self.ep_rank = get_neuron_ep_rank()
1034	            # EP-TP sub-group: used for blockwise mapping TP coordination.
1035	            # For pure EP (tp_degree=1) this is a single-rank group (no-op collectives).
1036	            # For variable EP+TP this is the TP sub-group within the EP partition.
1037	            self.ep_tp_group = get_neuron_ep_tp_group()
1038	            self.tp_degree = self.ep_tp_group.world_size
1039	        else:
1040	            # No EP: all experts on all ranks, intermediate dim sharded across
1041	            # TP * mlp_dp_size via the MLP TP group.
1042	            self.ep_degree = 1
1043	            self.ep_rank = 0
1044	            self.tp_degree = self.mlp_tp_group.world_size
1045	            self.ep_tp_group = self.tp_group
1046	        self.moe_group = self.mlp_tp_group if not self.ep_enabled else self.tp_group
1047	
1048	        # >>> PARALLELISM: Cross-DP EP <<<
1049	        # When EP degree exceeds the TP group size, experts span across DP
1050	        # replicas. MoE needs cross-DP collectives (all-gather/reduce-scatter)
1051	        # to exchange tokens between DP replicas before/after expert computation.
1052	        self.cross_dp_ep = self.dp_size > 1 and self.ep_enabled
1053	        if self.cross_dp_ep:
1054	            from vllm.distributed.parallel_state import (
1055	                get_dp_group,
1056	                get_wide_ep_group,
1057	            )
1058	
1059	            self.dp_group = get_dp_group()
1060	            # World-spanning group with device communicator for cross-DP all-reduce
1061	            self.wide_ep_group = get_wide_ep_group()
1062	
1063	        self.total_num_experts = config.num_local_experts
1064	
1065	        # Linear placement: EP rank k owns experts [k*L .. (k+1)*L)
1066	        self.num_local_experts = config.num_local_experts // self.ep_degree
1067	        self.num_experts_per_token = config.num_experts_per_tok
1068	        self.hidden_size = config.hidden_size
1069	        self.intermediate_size = config.intermediate_size
1070	        self.unpadded_hidden_size = config.unpadded_hidden_size
1071	        self.rms_norm_eps = config.rms_norm_eps
1072	
1073	        # >>> PARALLELISM: Intermediate dim sharded across TP degree <<<
1074	        self.intermediate_size_per_rank = self.intermediate_size // self.tp_degree
1075	        self.block_size = 256
1076	
1077	        # <-- MODEL-SPECIFIC: SwiGLU activation parameters
1078	        self.alpha = config.swiglu_alpha
1079	        self.limit = config.swiglu_limit
1080	
1081	        # <-- MODEL-SPECIFIC: Pre-MLP RMSNorm
1082	        self.post_attention_layernorm = GptOssRMSNorm(config)
1083	
1084	        # >>> PARALLELISM: Router weights replicated on all ranks (NOT EP-sharded) <<<
1085	        self.router_weight = nn.Parameter(
1086	            torch.empty(self.total_num_experts, self.hidden_size, dtype=torch.bfloat16)
1087	        )
1088	        self.router_bias = nn.Parameter(
1089	            torch.zeros(self.total_num_experts, dtype=torch.bfloat16)
1090	        )
1091	
1092	        # >>> PARALLELISM: Expert weights sharded on intermediate dim <<<
1093	        # gate_up_proj: [E, H, I_per_rank*2] (gate and up interleaved)
1094	        self.gate_up_proj_weight = nn.Parameter(
1095	            torch.empty(
1096	                self.num_local_experts,
1097	                self.hidden_size,
1098	                self.intermediate_size_per_rank * 2,
1099	                dtype=config.torch_dtype,
1100	            )
1101	        )
1102	        self.gate_up_proj_bias = nn.Parameter(
1103	            torch.zeros(
1104	                self.num_local_experts,
1105	                self.intermediate_size_per_rank * 2,
1106	                dtype=config.torch_dtype,
1107	            )
1108	        )
1109	        # down_proj: [E, I_per_rank, H]
1110	        self.down_proj_weight = nn.Parameter(
1111	            torch.empty(
1112	                self.num_local_experts,
1113	                self.intermediate_size_per_rank,
1114	                self.hidden_size,
1115	                dtype=config.torch_dtype,
1116	            )
1117	        )
1118	        self.down_proj_bias = nn.Parameter(
1119	            torch.zeros(
1120	                self.num_local_experts, self.hidden_size, dtype=config.torch_dtype
1121	            )
1122	        )
1123	
1124	        self._setup_weight_loaders()
1125	
1126	    def _setup_weight_loaders(self):
1127	        """Set up weight loaders for TP + EP sharding.
1128	
1129	        >>> PARALLELISM: TP sharding of intermediate dim, EP filtering of experts <<<
1130	        <-- MODEL-SPECIFIC: Checkpoint format is MXFP4 packed, needs dequantization
1131	        """
1132	        # Router: pad hidden dim (always full, not EP-sharded)
1133	        set_weight_loader(
1134	            self.router_weight, last_dim_padding_weight_loader(self.hidden_size)
1135	        )
1136	        set_weight_loader(
1137	            self.post_attention_layernorm.weight,
1138	            last_dim_padding_weight_loader(self.hidden_size),
1139	        )
1140	
1141	        # Linear EP placement: rank k owns experts [k*L, (k+1)*L)
1142	        local_expert_indices = list(
1143	            range(
1144	                self.ep_rank * self.num_local_experts,
1145	                (self.ep_rank + 1) * self.num_local_experts,
1146	            )
1147	        )
1148	
1149	        def _maybe_ep_wrap(loader):
1150	            """Wrap loader with EP expert filtering if ep_degree > 1,
1151	            and with rank override for mlp_dp_size > 1."""
1152	            if self.ep_degree > 1:
1153	                loader = expert_parallel_tensor_dim_loader(local_expert_indices, loader)
1154	            if self.mlp_dp_size > 1:
1155	                loader = with_rank_override(loader, rank=self.mlp_tp_rank)
1156	            return loader
1157	
1158	        # <-- MODEL-SPECIFIC: MXFP4 dequantization + TP sharding (+ EP filtering)
1159	        set_weight_loader(
1160	            self.gate_up_proj_weight,
1161	            _maybe_ep_wrap(
1162	                expert_gate_up_weight_sharding_loader(
1163	                    shard_size=self.intermediate_size_per_rank * 2,
1164	                    num_shards=self.tp_degree,
1165	                    hidden_size=self.hidden_size,
1166	                )
1167	            ),
1168	        )
1169	        set_weight_loader(
1170	            self.gate_up_proj_bias,
1171	            _maybe_ep_wrap(
1172	                expert_gate_up_bias_sharding_loader(
1173	                    shard_size=self.intermediate_size_per_rank * 2,
1174	                    num_shards=self.tp_degree,
1175	                )
1176	            ),
1177	        )
1178	        set_weight_loader(
1179	            self.down_proj_weight,
1180	            _maybe_ep_wrap(
1181	                expert_down_weight_sharding_loader(
1182	                    shard_size=self.intermediate_size_per_rank,
1183	                    num_shards=self.tp_degree,
1184	                    hidden_size=self.hidden_size,
1185	                )
1186	            ),
1187	        )
1188	        set_weight_loader(
1189	            self.down_proj_bias,
1190	            _maybe_ep_wrap(
1191	                scaled_bias_loader(scale=self.tp_degree, padded_size=self.hidden_size)
1192	            ),
1193	        )
1194	
1195	    def forward(
1196	        self,
1197	        hidden_states: torch.Tensor,
1198	        positions: torch.Tensor,
1199	        is_decode: bool,
1200	        rank: torch.Tensor,
1201	    ) -> torch.Tensor:
1202	        if is_decode:
1203	            return self.forward_decode(hidden_states, rank)
1204	        else:
1205	            return self.forward_prefill(hidden_states, positions, rank)
1206	
1207	    def _run_moe_block_tkg(self, hidden_states: torch.Tensor, rank: torch.Tensor):
1208	        """Run the fused MoE decode kernel on given hidden states.
1209	
1210	        >>> PARALLELISM: use_all_experts and rank_id for EP <<<
1211	        <-- MODEL-SPECIFIC: Activation, routing, clamping params
1212	        """
1213	        total_tokens = hidden_states.shape[0]
1214	        perc_experts_loaded = (
1215	            total_tokens * self.num_experts_per_token / self.num_local_experts
1216	        )
1217	        use_all_experts = (
1218	            perc_experts_loaded >= DEFAULT_SELECTIVE_LOADING_THRESHOLD
1219	            or self.ep_degree > 1
1220	        )
1221	        rank_id = None
1222	        if use_all_experts:
1223	            rank_id = torch.tensor(
1224	                [[self.ep_rank]], dtype=torch.int32, device=hidden_states.device
1225	            )
1226	
1227	        return NF.moe_block_tkg(
1228	            inp=hidden_states.unsqueeze(0),
1229	            gamma=self.post_attention_layernorm.weight.unsqueeze(0).to(torch.float32),
1230	            router_weights=self.router_weight.T,
1231	            expert_gate_up_weights=self.gate_up_proj_weight.reshape(
1232	                self.num_local_experts,
1233	                self.hidden_size,
1234	                2,
1235	                self.intermediate_size_per_rank,
1236	            ),
1237	            expert_down_weights=self.down_proj_weight,
1238	            rank_id=rank_id,
1239	            top_k=self.num_experts_per_token,
1240	            router_bias=self.router_bias.unsqueeze(0),
1241	            expert_gate_up_bias=self.gate_up_proj_bias.reshape(
1242	                self.num_local_experts,
1243	                2,
1244	                self.intermediate_size_per_rank,
1245	            ),
1246	            expert_down_bias=self.down_proj_bias,
1247	            eps=self.rms_norm_eps,
1248	            router_act_fn=RouterActFnType.SOFTMAX,
1249	            router_pre_norm=False,
1250	            expert_affinities_scaling_mode=ExpertAffinityScaleMode.POST_SCALE,
1251	            hidden_act_fn=ActFnType.Swish,
1252	            gate_clamp_upper_limit=self.limit,
1253	            gate_clamp_lower_limit=None,
1254	            up_clamp_upper_limit=self.limit + 1,
1255	            up_clamp_lower_limit=-self.limit + 1,
1256	            router_mm_dtype=nl.bfloat16,
1257	            hidden_actual=self.unpadded_hidden_size,
1258	            is_all_expert=use_all_experts,
1259	            skip_router_logits=True,
1260	        )
1261	
1262	    def forward_decode(self, hidden_states: torch.Tensor, rank: torch.Tensor):
1263	        """Decode: fused MoE kernel.
1264	
1265	        >>> PARALLELISM: TKG kernel with EP all-reduce <<<
1266	        >>> PARALLELISM: Cross-DP EP: all-gather tokens across DP before MoE,
1267	        >>>   slice back to own DP replica after all-reduce.
1268	        """
1269	        # >>> PARALLELISM: Cross-DP EP gather <<<
1270	        if self.cross_dp_ep:
1271	            hidden_states = self.dp_group.all_gather(hidden_states, dim=0)
1272	
1273	        output = self._run_moe_block_tkg(hidden_states, rank)
1274	
1275	        # >>> PARALLELISM: All-reduce across world for cross-DP EP <<<
1276	        if self.cross_dp_ep:
1277	            # All-reduce across entire world (all TP and DP ranks)
1278	            output = self.wide_ep_group.all_reduce(output)
1279	            # Slice to keep only this DP replica's tokens
1280	            dp_rank = self.dp_group.rank_in_group
1281	            tokens_per_dp = output.shape[0] // self.dp_size
1282	            start_idx = dp_rank * tokens_per_dp
1283	            end_idx = start_idx + tokens_per_dp
1284	            output = output[start_idx:end_idx]
1285	        elif self.moe_group.world_size > 1:
1286	            output = self.moe_group.all_reduce(output)
1287	
1288	        return output
1289	
1290	    def forward_prefill(
1291	        self,
1292	        hidden_states: torch.Tensor,
1293	        positions: torch.Tensor,
1294	        rank: torch.Tensor,
1295	    ):
1296	        """Prefill: blockwise MoE with CTE kernel.
1297	
1298	        >>> PARALLELISM: All-gather from SP → MoE → reduce-scatter back to SP <<<
1299	        <-- MODEL-SPECIFIC: Softmax routing, SwiGLU activation, clamping
1300	        """
1301	        # <-- MODEL-SPECIFIC: Pre-MLP RMSNorm
1302	        hidden_states = self.post_attention_layernorm(hidden_states)
1303	
1304	        # Router: [T/world_size, H] → [T/world_size, E_total]
1305	        expert_affinities = NF.router(
1306	            hidden_states=hidden_states,
1307	            router_weights=self.router_weight.T,
1308	            top_k=self.num_experts_per_token,
1309	            router_bias=self.router_bias,
1310	            # <-- MODEL-SPECIFIC: Softmax routing
1311	            activation="softmax",
1312	            computation_dtype=torch.float32,
1313	        )
1314	
1315	        # >>> PARALLELISM: All-gather from SP for full sequence (within TP group) <<<
1316	        if self.tp_group.world_size > 1:
1317	            expert_affinities = self.tp_group.all_gather(expert_affinities, dim=0)
1318	            hidden_states = self.tp_group.all_gather(hidden_states, dim=0)
1319	
1320	        # Compute padding mask from positions (True = real token, False = padding).
1321	        # Must be computed before cross-DP gather since positions from different
1322	        # DP replicas are not monotonically increasing when concatenated.
1323	        padding_mask = None
1324	        if positions is not None:
1325	            last_real_idx = torch.argmax(positions)
1326	            token_indices = torch.arange(positions.shape[0], device=positions.device)
1327	            padding_mask = token_indices <= last_real_idx
1328	
1329	        # >>> PARALLELISM: Cross-DP EP gather — collect tokens from all DP replicas <<<
1330	        if self.cross_dp_ep:
1331	            expert_affinities = self.dp_group.all_gather(expert_affinities, dim=0)
1332	            hidden_states = self.dp_group.all_gather(hidden_states, dim=0)
1333	            if padding_mask is not None:
1334	                padding_mask = self.dp_group.all_gather(padding_mask, dim=0)
1335	
1336	        # >>> PARALLELISM: With EP, map global affinities to local experts <<<
1337	        if self.ep_degree > 1:
1338	            local_expert_indices = torch.arange(
1339	                self.ep_rank * self.num_local_experts,
1340	                (self.ep_rank + 1) * self.num_local_experts,
1341	                device=hidden_states.device,
1342	                dtype=torch.int32,
1343	            )
1344	            expert_affinities = NF.get_local_expert_affinities(
1345	                expert_affinities, local_expert_indices
1346	            )
1347	
1348	        # Build blockwise mapping for efficient MoE dispatch
1349	        # >>> PARALLELISM: ep_tp_group provides TP rank coordination within
1350	        # the EP partition. For pure TP this is the full tp_group; for pure EP
1351	        # it is a single-rank group (no sharding); for variable EP+TP it is
1352	        # the TP sub-group within the EP partition.
1353	        (
1354	            expert_affinities_masked,
1355	            token_position_to_id,
1356	            block_to_expert,
1357	            conditions,
1358	        ) = NF.build_blockwise_mapping(
1359	            expert_affinities=expert_affinities,
1360	            num_local_experts=self.num_local_experts,
1361	            num_experts_per_token=self.num_experts_per_token,
1362	            block_size=self.block_size,
1363	            moe_group=self.ep_tp_group,
1364	            tp_degree=self.tp_degree,
1365	            padding_mask=padding_mask,
1366	        )
1367	
1368	        output = NF.moe_cte(
1369	            implementation=MoECTEImplementation.shard_on_block,
1370	            conditions=conditions,
1371	            hidden_states=hidden_states,
1372	            expert_affinities_masked=expert_affinities_masked,
1373	            gate_up_proj_weight=self.gate_up_proj_weight.reshape(
1374	                self.num_local_experts,
1375	                self.hidden_size,
1376	                2,
1377	                self.intermediate_size_per_rank,
1378	            ),
1379	            down_proj_weight=self.down_proj_weight,
1380	            gate_and_up_proj_bias=self.gate_up_proj_bias.reshape(
1381	                self.num_local_experts,
1382	                2,
1383	                self.intermediate_size_per_rank,
1384	            ),
1385	            down_proj_bias=self.down_proj_bias.unsqueeze(1),
1386	            # <-- MODEL-SPECIFIC: SwiGLU with clamping
1387	            activation_function=ActFnType.Swish,
1388	            block_size=self.block_size,
1389	            token_position_to_id=token_position_to_id.to(dtype=torch.int32),
1390	            block_to_expert=block_to_expert.to(dtype=torch.int32),
1391	            expert_affinities_scaling_mode=ExpertAffinityScaleMode.POST_SCALE,
1392	            skip_token=True,
1393	            gate_clamp_upper_limit=self.limit,
1394	            gate_clamp_lower_limit=None,
1395	            up_clamp_upper_limit=self.limit + 1,
1396	            up_clamp_lower_limit=-self.limit + 1,
1397	            is_tensor_update_accumulating=True,
1398	            compute_dtype=nl.bfloat16,
1399	        )
1400	
1401	        # >>> PARALLELISM: Cross-DP EP all-reduce and slice <<<
1402	        if self.cross_dp_ep:
1403	            # All-reduce across entire world (all TP and DP ranks)
1404	            output = self.wide_ep_group.all_reduce(output)
1405	            # Slice to keep only this DP replica's tokens
1406	            dp_rank = self.dp_group.rank_in_group
1407	            tokens_per_dp = output.shape[0] // self.dp_size
1408	            start_idx = dp_rank * tokens_per_dp
1409	            end_idx = start_idx + tokens_per_dp
1410	            output = output[start_idx:end_idx]
1411	            # Slice to keep only this TP rank's SP chunk
1412	            tp_rank = self.moe_group.rank_in_group
1413	            tokens_per_tp = output.shape[0] // self.moe_group.world_size
1414	            start_idx = tp_rank * tokens_per_tp
1415	            end_idx = start_idx + tokens_per_tp
1416	            output = output[start_idx:end_idx]
1417	        # >>> PARALLELISM: Combine expert results and return to SP layout <<<
1418	        elif self.moe_group.world_size > 1:
1419	            output = self.moe_group.reduce_scatter(output, dim=0)
1420	
1421	        return output
1422

1424	# =============================================================================
1425	# Section 5: MLP Wrapper
1426	# <-- MODEL-SPECIFIC: Thin wrapper around experts
1427	# =============================================================================
1428	class GptOssMLP(nn.Module):
1429	    """MLP layer with Mixture of Experts.
1430	
1431	    <-- MODEL-SPECIFIC: This wrapper exists because GPT-OSS uses MoE.
1432	    A dense model would have a simple MLP here instead.
1433	    """
1434	
1435	    def __init__(self, config: GptOssConfig):
1436	        super().__init__()
1437	        self.experts = GptOssExperts(config)
1438	        self.dtype = config.torch_dtype
1439	
1440	    def forward(
1441	        self,
1442	        hidden_states: torch.Tensor,
1443	        positions: torch.Tensor,
1444	        is_decode: bool,
1445	        rank: torch.Tensor,
1446	    ) -> torch.Tensor:
1447	        hidden_states = hidden_states.to(self.dtype)
1448	        return self.experts(
1449	            hidden_states, positions=positions, is_decode=is_decode, rank=rank
1450	        )
1451

1453	# =============================================================================
1454	# Section 6: Decoder Layer
1455	# Mixed: PARALLELISM (SP residual handling) +
1456	#        MODEL-SPECIFIC (pre-attention norm, residual connections)
1457	# =============================================================================
1458	def _dp_transition(
1459	    x: torch.Tensor,
1460	    current_group,
1461	    target_group,
1462	    dim: int = 0,
1463	) -> torch.Tensor:
1464	    """Transition tensor between DP gathered states.
1465	
1466	    Args:
1467	        x: Input tensor, gathered over current_group.world_size DP ranks along dim.
1468	        current_group: GroupCoordinator for the current DP column group.
1469	        target_group: GroupCoordinator for the target DP column group.
1470	        dim: Batch dimension to gather/slice along.
1471	
1472	    Returns:
1473	        Tensor at target gathered state.
1474	    """
1475	    current_dp = current_group.world_size
1476	    target_dp = target_group.world_size
1477	    if current_dp == target_dp:
1478	        return x
1479	    if current_dp > target_dp:
1480	        per_dp = x.shape[dim] // current_dp
1481	        start = (current_group.rank_in_group // target_dp) * target_dp * per_dp
1482	        return x.narrow(dim, start, target_dp * per_dp)
1483	    # Up: go through local first to avoid duplicates from overlapping gathered state,
1484	    # then all-gather to target.
1485	    per_dp = x.shape[dim] // current_dp
1486	    x = x.narrow(dim, current_group.rank_in_group * per_dp, per_dp)
1487	    return target_group.all_gather(x, dim=dim)
